text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You know, I heard there's a shop that sells really cute cakes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I ate one of those cakes, it'd be like a cute
meets cute! Cuteness squared! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And you know, I'd love to show you the cutest
Curren possible...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And you know, I'd love to show you the cutest
Curren possible...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If you got me one of those cakes, I just know my cuteness would skyrocket!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If you got me one of those cakes, I just know my cuteness would skyrocket!
